siteFooter.tagline: A seeded voxel world protocol on Solana.

meta.title: NiceChunk | Own the world, one chunk at a time

hero.title: Own the world, one chunk at a time.
hero.subtitle: NiceChunk is a Solana-powered voxel world where every chunk is seeded, explorable, mineable, and shaped by players. Explore land, discover resources, forge assets, and join a persistent world economy built around verifiable game state.

world.title: A world generated by seeds, changed by players.
world.body: NiceChunk is not a fixed map. The world expands chunk by chunk. Terrain, resources, and player actions form a persistent state that can be verified, traded, and built on. Every explorer helps reveal the world. Every builder leaves a mark.

seed.title: Live seed generation
seed.body: A changing seed creates a new chunk preview with terrain height, water, forest, sand, snow, and resource hints.
seed.label: Seed

explore.title: Explore Chunks
explore.body: Enter the browser-based voxel world. Move across seeded terrain, discover new chunks, and find places worth claiming.

mine.title: Mine Resources
mine.body: Break blocks, reveal hidden resources, and turn exploration into useful materials for the world economy.

forge.title: Forge Assets
forge.body: Combine raw materials into tools, blueprints, equipment, and future tradable game assets.

identity.title: Player Identity
identity.body: Connect your wallet, create your player profile, and carry your progress across the NiceChunk world.

watchers.title: Guardian Network
watchers.body: Guardian nodes help make regions accessible, support real-time communication, and prepare the world for decentralized coordination.

economy.title: NCK powers the NiceChunk economy.
economy.body: NCK is designed as the core utility token of NiceChunk. It can be used for genesis access, in-world actions, forging systems, marketplace settlement, and future governance mechanics. The goal is simple: make the world economy belong to the players who explore, build, mine, and operate it.

utility.genesis: Genesis Pass access connected to NCK

watchers.title: Run a Guardian. Keep a region alive.
watchers.body: Guardian nodes are the access layer of NiceChunk. They do not control player assets or process on-chain transactions. Instead, they help regions stay reachable, provide real-time communication, and support local world activity. As the world grows, Guardians become the infrastructure that keeps chunks alive.

rules.title: Transparent world rules.
rules.body: NiceChunk is built around open generation rules. Chunks are generated from seeds, player actions update world state, and important economic actions are designed to be verifiable. The world should be playable, but also inspectable.

roadmap.title: From alpha world preview to player-owned protocol.

phase1.title: Phase 1 - Alpha World Preview
phase1.body: Browser voxel client, wallet connection, seeded terrain preview, player setup.

phase2.title: Phase 2 - Mining & Forging
phase2.body: Resource discovery, block interaction, material logic, forging bench, basic asset loop.

phase3.title: Phase 3 - NCK Economy
phase3.body: Genesis pass, NCK utility, marketplace settlement, player-owned asset layer.

phase4.title: Phase 4 - Guardian Network
phase4.body: Region access nodes, real-time communication, guardian staking, region-level participation.

phase5.title: Phase 5 - World Governance
phase5.body: Territory rules, world parameters, player voting, long-term protocol governance.

footer.tagline: A seeded voxel world protocol on Solana.
